productionReadinessCoverageMatrix.sourceRole: Ardyn harness/framework/contract layer, metadata-only and runtime-blocked

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn does not implement an owned frontend; future Locus or Multiverse display surfaces are consumer contracts only.
matrixRows.productionGap: No Ardyn-owned UI, WCAG audit, browser-state persistence, visual regression suite, or cross-browser production surface exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit consumer-display contract scope before any Locus or Multiverse UI can depend on Ardyn status.
No browser runtime, live status polling, or UI control is authorized by this matrix.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Document display metadata and consumer contract expectations for future review.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn exposes review-only helper functions and static CLI metadata, not a backend API or server runtime.
matrixRows.productionGap: No HTTP API, long-running backend, request lifecycle, server auth middleware, or live command endpoint is implemented.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires separate runtime enablement, command exposure, HTTP surface, and process-control authorization.
`serve-runtime` remains default-blocked, including dry-run.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Run deterministic review-only helpers and focused tests without serving requests.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn records fixture metadata in the repo only; database, storage, transcript, and audit runtime writes are blocked.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production database, object storage, retention policy, migration workflow, transcript writer, or audit writer exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit DB/storage authorization plus transcript/audit write authorization.
RLS and retention controls remain hypothetical until a storage substrate exists.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Keep deterministic JSON fixtures and schemas under version control.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Auth and permissions are metadata-only approval-boundary planning; no grant, reviewer routing, or evaluator decision is authoritative.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production identity provider, session model, role system, grant persistence, or permission enforcement runtime exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires separate identity, approval decision, approval grant, and connector permission authorization.
Current approval metadata cannot authorize runtime.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Describe approval prerequisites and blocked grant boundaries for review.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn is not deployed as a live application; local package and report metadata do not provision hosting.
matrixRows.productionGap: No hosting target, release environment, deployment topology, health endpoint, or runtime rollout strategy exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit deployment authorization and runtime health contract.
Report generation remains local metadata and does not run checks or deploy.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Record local package scripts and report status metadata.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Cloud compute is a future runtime concern; Ardyn currently has no workers, queues, functions, containers, or hosted compute.
matrixRows.productionGap: No cloud account binding, compute runtime, autoscaling worker, job queue, container image, or cloud IAM boundary exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit runtime, cloud provider, secrets, and process-control authorization.
Rust host metadata remains deliberately blocked.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Describe blocked host and compute boundaries as review-only metadata.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: The repo has local test/report gates and versioned fixtures, but this matrix does not claim external CI or deployment automation.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production release pipeline, deployment gate, signed artifact workflow, or current external CI status is asserted by Ardyn metadata.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires separate release governance before report status can represent deployability.
This report remains evidence inventory only and does not execute checks.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Run local tests and record validation commands for reviewers.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Security is expressed through static schemas, blocked runtime flags, and advisory scans; RLS applies only if future DB/storage exists.
matrixRows.productionGap: No live auth context, RLS policy, penetration-test record, production secret boundary, or runtime security monitoring exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires DB/storage and auth authorization before RLS can be meaningful.
Security scans remain advisory evidence only.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Validate schemas and record static security hardening metadata.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Rate limiting is not applicable to current review-only helpers because there is no network listener or API surface.
matrixRows.productionGap: No request throttle, tenant quota, abuse-control policy, or rate-limit telemetry exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires an authorized HTTP/websocket surface before rate limits can be implemented.
No runtime traffic is accepted today.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: State that runtime traffic is unavailable.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Caching and CDN behavior are future delivery concerns; current artifacts are local deterministic files.
matrixRows.productionGap: No CDN, cache invalidation, edge policy, asset pipeline, or stale-content control exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires hosted surfaces and deployment authorization.
Local fixtures are not CDN artifacts.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Keep fixture data local and deterministic.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: There is no live Ardyn service to scale; load balancing remains a future runtime deployment concern.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production instance model, load balancer, autoscaling rule, queue backpressure, or capacity SLO exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires live runtime and hosting authorization before scaling controls can exist.
Current readiness gates are review-only.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Track readiness questions without claiming capacity.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn has static failure-audit, redaction, and transcript contracts, but no runtime log writer or external error tracker.
currentEvidenceInRepo: Phase 4.1C framing and redaction contracts doc
matrixRows.productionGap: No live log sink, trace collector, alerting integration, retention workflow, or incident correlation exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires runtime log-write and external service authorization.
Transcript and audit runtime writes remain blocked.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Review static failure and redaction contracts.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Ardyn documents rollback and readiness boundaries, but has no live availability target, DR plan, RTO, or RPO.
matrixRows.productionGap: No uptime SLO, backup/restore path, failover, disaster recovery runbook, RTO, or RPO is implemented.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires live runtime, storage, deployment, and operations authorization.
Current rollback records are metadata only.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Document blocked rollback and readiness concepts for review.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Infrastructure and compliance are documented as boundaries; no IaC, cloud policy enforcement, or compliance attestation is produced.
matrixRows.productionGap: No infrastructure-as-code, environment inventory, compliance control mapping, audit evidence pack, or policy enforcement runtime exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit infrastructure ownership and external service authorization.
Current architecture docs are non-authorizing.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Maintain static architecture and boundary documentation.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Review-only testing is covered through Node, schema, report, and Rust validation gates.
matrixRows.productionGap: Production E2E, browser, load, chaos, and deployment-smoke suites remain future work because runtime is blocked.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Runtime tests require separate runtime authorization.
Current tests verify deterministic metadata and blocked behavior only.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Run local deterministic tests and schema/report validation.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Operations are expressed as review artifacts and report status; no on-call, SLO, monitor, runbook automation, or retry/circuit breaker runtime exists.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production monitor, alert route, operational runbook, retry policy, circuit breaker, incident workflow, or SLO exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires live runtime, external service, and schedule authorization for operational monitors.
No background polling is authorized.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Render local report metadata and review readiness gates.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Governance coverage is strong for review-only phase boundaries, ownership records, and non-authorizing fixtures.
matrixRows.productionGap: Production change-management, release ownership, dependency lifecycle, and runtime deprecation policy remain to be formalized.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires release governance before any production readiness claim.
Current governance is review-only and metadata-bound.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Track phase scope, docs, fixtures, ownership boundaries, and validation commands.

matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: Secrets management is covered only as a hard block: no env, vault, credential, or secret ingestion is allowed in Ardyn.
matrixRows.productionGap: No production vault, key rotation, secret scanning gate, credential provider, or runtime secret injection exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit secrets authorization before any env, vault, or credential access.
Secure Drop and connector paths cannot use secrets in the current phase.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Assert that secrets, env, vault, and credential ingestion are blocked.

matrixRows.areaName: System Discovery / service registry / schedule enforcement
matrixRows.ardynSpecificInterpretation: System discovery remains metadata-only; Ardyn has no live registry, connector discovery, service scanning, schedule enforcement, or polling.
matrixRows.productionGap: No service registry, schedule runner, connector discovery, live service scan, MCP task execution, or background polling exists.
authorizationPrerequisiteNotes: Requires explicit registry, connector, MCP/task, network, and schedule authorization.
Current metadata cannot poll, discover, scan, or enforce schedules.
matrixRows.currentAllowedBehavior: Document that discovery, registry, and schedule surfaces are unavailable.

topProductionReadinessGaps: No live frontend, backend API, server runtime, or deployment surface exists.
No DB/storage substrate, transcript/audit runtime writer, RLS policy, or recovery workflow exists.
No secrets, connector grants, Fabric runtime, websocket/http surface, MCP/task execution, Secure Drop, service discovery, schedule enforcement, or background polling is authorized.
Production observability, rate limiting, caching/CDN, load balancing, SLOs, DR/RTO/RPO, and operations automation remain future runtime concerns.
